title: AU: Immersive Engineering
description: Almost Unified integration for Immersive Engineering.
body:
# Information

This is a mod for [Minecraft]-[NeoForge].

It adds [Almost Unified][au] integration to [Immersive Engineering][ie].
Previously, integration was part of the base mod [Almost Unified][au]. With the increasing number of compatibility issues, the authors of [Immersive Engineering][ie] were contacted to see if they would be interested in direct integration. This was declined.

In order to continue to ensure seamless integration, an add-on was the only option. With the add-on, it is now also possible to convert not only [Immersive Engineering][ie] recipes, but also the internal priority system used, for example, by ore deposits or Arc Furnace recycling.

While this add-on is installed, the priorities in the [Immersive Engineering][ie] config are only used if the items are not already handled by [Almost Unified][au].

# Features

The add-on holds the recipe unifier for all recipe types of [Immersive Engineering][ie]. It's used to convert their recipes.
Additionally, it intercepts the priority logic, so all mechanics relying on it use the appropriate output.

- general recipe unification
- Arc Furnace Recycling unification
- Mineral Deposit unification


[minecraft]: https://www.minecraft.net/
[au]: https://github.com/AlmostReliable/almostunified
[ie]: https://github.com/BluSunrize/ImmersiveEngineering
[neoforge]: https://neoforged.net/
